description_long: This handbag is crafted from a pale green ceramic-like material, featuring an open latticework design around its body. The rim is thick and rounded, forming a continuous handle integrated into the structure, with large oval openings for easy gripping. Decorative orange rose flowers with green leaves are applied at four equidistant points around the exterior, adding a touch of color and elegance. The interior is hollow and spacious, suitable for carrying small personal items, while the openwork sides allow visibility and airflow. The surface appears matte with a slightly rough texture, and the overall form is oval with a low profile. There are no visible brand logos, closures, or additional compartments.
description: A pale green, openwork ceramic handbag with integrated handles and orange rose decorations, featuring a hollow, oval form and matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main handle opening and two orange rose decorations with green leaves on the near side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lattice structure and a single orange rose with leaves, with the handle arching above.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite pair of rose decorations and the open rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a single rose and the intricate latticework, with the handle visible.
attribute_strap_type: Single integrated short handle, rigid, non-adjustable, part of the main body structure.
attribute_closure_mechanism: None; the handbag is open at the top with no visible closure.
attribute_decorative_elements: Four orange rose flowers with green leaves applied around the exterior.
